zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes於1392年出生在英國史洛普爾布利其諾斯時，他的父親Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth21歲，母親Margaret Sutherland17歲。他和Mrs. Walter de Grene至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1456年12月8日在英國米德萊可海斯享年64歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可海斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes于1392年出生在英国史洛普爾布利其諾斯时，他的父亲Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth21岁，母亲Margaret Sutherland17岁。他和Mrs. Walter de Grene至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1456年12月8日在英国米德萊可海斯享年64岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可海斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes was born in 1392, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, his father, Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Sutherland, was 17. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Mrs. Walter de Grene. He died on 8 December 1456, in Hayes, Middlesex, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Hayes, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes est né en 1392, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sutherland, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Mrs. Walter de Grene. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1456, à Hayes, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Hayes, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes 1392 in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Sutherland 17. Er hatte mit Mrs. Walter de Grene mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1456 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hayes, Middlesex, England und wurde in Hayes, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes è nato il nel 1392 nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Sutherland, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Mrs. Walter de Grene. Morì il 8 dicembre 1456, nel Hayes, Middlesex, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Hayes, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Grene of Hayesが1392年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースで生まれた時，父Walter de Grene of Bridgnorthは21歳，母Margaret Sutherlandは17歳であった。彼はMrs. Walter de Greneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1456年12月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスヘイズで64歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスヘイズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes(이)가 1392년 영국 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Sutherland(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Mrs. Walter de Grene(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 12월 8일 영국 미들레세스 헤예스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 헤예스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes nasceu em 1392, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sutherland, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Mrs. Walter de Grene. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1456, em Hayes, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Hayes, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes родился в 1392 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sutherland, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Mrs. Walter de Grene. Он умер 8 декабря 1456 г. в местности хеиесь, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности хеиесь, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter de Grene of Hayes nació en 1392, en Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Grene of Bridgnorth, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Sutherland, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Mrs. Walter de Grene. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1456, en Hayes, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Hayes, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
